title: Kan Irandil Modhi Lyrics Uthama Puthiran
stanzas: <div>Kan Irandil Modhi Lyrics Uthama Puthiran

Kan irandil modhi
nana vizhunthene.
kaaranam indriye
naan siriththaene.

en manadhum yeno
ennidam illai
vendiye unnidam
naan tholaithaene

en uyirin uyire
en iravin nilave
un arugil varave
nee tharuvaai varamey

oorukulla kodi ponnu
yaaraiyum nenaikkalaiye
undhan mugam paartha
pinne edhuvum pidikkalaiye

unnudaiya paarvaiyila
en udambu veguthadi
pakkathile nee irundhaa
en vayasu noguthadi.

Kan irandil modhi
nana vizhunthene.
kaaranam indriye
naan siriththaene.

en manadhum yeno
ennidam illai
vendiye unnidam
naan tholaithaene

oh yedho onnu solla
en nenjukuli thalla
nee poththi vachcha
aasai ellaam
kannu munna thallaada

kannamoochi aattam
en kannukulla aada
nee sollum solla
kaetkaamalae undhan
ullam thindaada.

ullukkula padapadakka
nenjukulla siragadikka
kaalu rendu rekka kaati
maele keele para parakka

pattu poochi pattaampoochi
aanaeney.

un muththu muthu pechu
en sngeethama aachu
un sundu viral theendaiyila
ninnu pochu en moochu

panju meththa megam
adhil senju vachcha dhegam
nee thoorathile ninnaakooda
pongiduthe en mugam

mutta kannu muzhi azhagil
kuthi kuthi konnavalae
sikkiktta en manasa
oora vachi thuvachchavale

aathukulla ammikallaa
poneney..

oorukulla kodi ponnu
yaaraiyum nenaikkalaiye
undhan mugam paartha
pinne edhuvum pidikkalaiye

unnudaiya paarvaiyila
en udambu veguthadi
pakkathile nee irundhaa
en vayasu noguthadi.

Kan irandil modhi
nana vizhunthene.
kaaranam indriye
naan siriththaene.

en manadhum yeno
ennidam illai
vendiye unnidam
naan tholaithaene

en uyirin uyire
en iravin nilave
un arugil varave
nee tharuvaai varamey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kan Irandil Modhi?

The song captures themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its soothing melody.

Who is the singer of Kan Irandil Modhi?

The song is sung by Naresh Iyer, known for his soulful voice.

Who composed the music for Uthama Puthiran?

The music for the movie was composed by Vijay Antony.

When was Uthama Puthiran released?

The movie was released on November 5, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Uthama Puthiran, the song Kan Irandil Modhi beautifully portrays the emotions of love and yearning. Sung by Naresh Iyer, the track is a soothing melody that resonates with the feelings of longing and desire. The lyrics express a deep connection and the hope for togetherness, making it a perfect romantic number. Vijay Antony's music adds a mesmerizing touch, enhancing the emotional depth of the song.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Kan Irandil Modhi from the movie Uthama Puthiran. Naresh Iyer's captivating voice combined with Vijay Antony's mesmerizing music creates a romantic ambiance that resonates with the heart. Dive into this enchanting track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: I stumbled and fell in your eyes. I smiled for no reason.
My heart is not with me anymore; I lost it to you.
My life's soul, my night's moon, come close and give me a blessing.
In the town, there are many girls, but I didn't think of anyone else after seeing your face.
Your look makes my body shiver, and when you're near, my youth aches.
I stumbled and fell in your eyes. I smiled for no reason.
My heart is not with me anymore; I lost it to you.
Something is pushing my heart to say something. All my hidden desires are coming out.
Playing hide and seek in my eyes, your words affect me without listening.
Inside, my heart is fluttering, and my feet want to fly up and down like wings.
I became a butterfly.
Your sweet words became my music, and your gentle touch took my breath away.
The soft cloud made of cotton, even when you stand far, my face lights up.
Your eyes pierced with beauty, capturing my heart and making it dance.
I went to the grinding stone at home.
In the town, there are many girls, but I didn't think of anyone else after seeing your face.
Your look makes my body shiver, and when you're near, my youth aches.
I stumbled and fell in your eyes. I smiled for no reason.
My heart is not with me anymore; I lost it to you.
My life's soul, my night's moon, come close and give me a blessing.
